title: Renewal timeline
description: Visual timeline showing renewal history for a membership. Each dot = a MembershipRenewal — green (succeeded), red (failed_transient/failed_permanent), yellow (attempting). Timeline extends to next_renewal_at with an 'upcoming' marker. Used on membership detail pages + admin dunning dashboards.

template.propsExpr: { content: 'Period ' + $formatDate(item.period_starts_at, 'D MMM YYYY') + ' — attempt ' + item.attempt_number + ' — ' + item.status + (item.failure_reason ? ' (' + item.failure_reason + ')' : '') }

children.propsExpr: { className: 'size-3 rounded-full ' + (item.status === 'succeeded' ? 'bg-success-500' : item.status === 'failed_transient' ? 'bg-warning-500' : item.status === 'failed_permanent' ? 'bg-danger-500' : item.status === 'attempting' ? 'bg-info-500 animate-pulse' : 'bg-neutral-300') }

props.className: size-3 rounded-full border-2 border-dashed border-neutral-400 bg-transparent
